# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[concat('sqlserver-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Server
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: app-staging-db
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Database
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin
    metadata:
      description: Administrator username for SQL Server
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: AzureSQL2024!
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for SQL Server
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - P1
      - P2
    metadata:
      description: SQL Database SKU
  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
      - Premium
    metadata:
      description: SQL Database tier
  maxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2147483648
    metadata:
      description: Maximum size of the database in bytes
  developmentIPs:
    type: array
    defaultValue:
      - 203.0.113.10
      - 203.0.113.20
      - 198.51.100.50
    metadata:
      description: Development IP addresses to allow
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: '12.0'
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
    tags:
      Environment: Staging
      Purpose: Development and Testing
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      catalogCollation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
    tags:
      Environment: Staging
      Purpose: Development and Testing
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAllAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: 2021-11-01
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/DevIP-', copyIndex())]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    copy:
      name: firewallRulesCopy
      count: "[length(parameters('developmentIPs'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('developmentIPs')[copyIndex()]]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('developmentIPs')[copyIndex()]]"
outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('administratorLogin'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
